description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the handguard has multiple slots for additional attachments. The rifle includes standard iron sights, with the front and rear sights both visible. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for improved handling, and the trigger guard is slightly enlarged. The magazine and several loose cartridges are shown alongside the rifle, emphasizing its semi-automatic or automatic design. The muzzle is fitted with a flash hider, and the overall build suggests a robust, metal-dominant construction suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, and attached magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the Picatinny rail, iron sights, and the magazine and cartridges placed beside the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine well, and loose cartridges and magazine below the rifle.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the barrel, flash hider, and the arrangement of the magazine and cartridges.
